channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bitmine’s Ethereum Hoard Surges Past 5.28 Million ETH as Company Nears 5% Supply Target

item.description: Microsoft has disclosed a new security vulnerability impacting on-premise versions of Exchange Server that it said has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-202...

item.title: CISA Adds Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20182 to KEV After Admin Access Exploits

item.title: Taiwan Bullet Train Hack Highlights Cybersecurity Gaps in Rail Systems
item.description: A Taiwanese student experimenting with software-defined radio technology shut down three bullet trains for nearly an hour, leading to an anti-terrorism response....

item.title: No need to hack when it’s leaking: Dalbir Singh & Associates law firm edition
item.description: Dalbir Singh & Associates ignored multiple attempts at responsible disclosure but finally locked down its misconfigured Amazon bucket, only to expose it again. Now the data is in the hands of criminal...

item.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller Auth Bypass Actively Exploited to Gain Admin Access

item.title: Stealer Backdoor Found in 3 Node-IPC Versions Targeting Developer Secrets

item.title: 'FrostyNeighbor' APT Carefully Targets Govt Orgs in Poland, Ukraine

item.title: Ghostwriter Targets Ukrainian Government With Geofenced PDF Phishing, Cobalt Strike
item.description: The Belarus-aligned threat group known as Ghostwriter has been attributed to a fresh set of attacks targeting governmental organizations in Ukraine. Active since at least 2016, Ghostwriter has been li...
